Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: A DNA test, a relationship on the edge and an ultimatum that could change everything put a young couple's future on the line.
Video.title: Wright vs. Flanagan

Video.summary: A polygraph test will determine if Deandre has been unfaithful to his girlfriend, Olivia.
Video.title: Shiel vs. Spraggins

Video.summary: A club bathroom threesome and a busted car window have ex-lovers at each other's throats.
Video.title: Aikens vs. Brown

Video.summary: Claudette is suing her neighbor for jumping her and falsely accusing her of pullling a gun on her daughter.
Video.title: Gunning for Her Neighbor

Video.summary: First, Aunt sues niece for destroying car and failure to repay loan. Then, a dad sues his son for unpaid loan.
Video.title: Family Feuds

Video.summary: First, sisters dispute over a cell phone. Then, man sues neighbor for allegedly destroying his chainsaw.
Video.title: Buzz Kill

Video.summary: First, business partners dispute over a loan. Then, plaintiff provided legal services and is suing client.
Video.title: It's Just Business

Video.summary: First, an ex-girlfriend sues for bowling ball purchase. Then, a friend sues ex-band member.
Video.title: Bowling for Dupes

Video.summary: First, unpaid rent amongst best friends come to court. Then, the plaintiff claims he was struck by vehicle.
Video.title: Pain and Suffering

Video.summary: First, litigants seek payment for deposits. Then, a sister sues her brother for failure to pay a bond.
Video.title: Broken Bonds

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims the defendant crashed into her car. Then, plaintiff is suing for unpaid rent and bail.
Video.title: Bail Outs

Video.summary: First, you shouldn’t do business with your friends! Then, a woman says she was never paid for services.
Video.title: Business with Friends

Video.summary: First, a woman claims she was not paid for her services. Then, plaintiff contends damage to his windshield.
Video.title: A Rock in Hard Place

Video.summary: First, a man is suing his ex-fiancée for the return of the engagement ring. Then, a botched car sale.
Video.title: A Story of Repossession

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims defendant stole her puppy. Then, plaintiff alleges that her ex abused her.
Video.title: Puppy Love

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff claims defendant took her money. Then, a man claims he was not paid or for renovations.
Video.title: Conned Out of Love

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: Jacoby isn’t so happy about Amber’s business success and called off the wedding. A compatibility test decides their future.
Video.title: Rouzan vs Lunkins

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: Trust issues and tension rise as Danielle confronts Brandon about his ex-wife and lack of motivation.
Video.title: Hatch vs. Banks

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: The Cutlers navigate a messy situationship when Ricardo brings Errollyn to court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Clarke vs. Smith

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: Sabrina is suing her child's father after claiming he threw a man-tantrum and broke their son's tablet.
Video.title: Did a Dad's Punishment Go Too Far?

Image.alt: Did a Dad's Punishment Go Too Far?
Did a Dad's Punishment Go Too Far?
Did a Dad's Punishment Go Too Far?

Video.summary: Neil Sattar claims the defendant hired him to DJ and. Photograph a Sweet 16 party and everyone had a rocking time - and he has the photos to prove it. The defendant, Janeen, says the sneaky plaintiff negotiated a separate deal on the side, for clicking pictures at the party, when he was only hired to DJ the event, and has been harassing her staff mercilessly. He’s not going to allow her to get away with not paying him and is suing for everything he’s owed from this party pooper.
Video.title: Party Pooper

Video.summary: Marva Utley sues Ed’s bakery for $1,500 after receiving a red velvet cake instead of the rum cake she ordered for her daughter's birthday. Ed claims it was a mix-up by a new employee and offered a refund, but Marva says the mistake ruined the party.
Video.title: Cake Catastrophe

Video.summary: Plaintiff Brenda claims her neighbor's pit bull attacked her dog and bit her, causing $4,643 in damages. Defendant Christine denies liability, stating the dogs aren’t hers and Brenda’s gate was open.
Video.title: Devastated by a Dog Attack

Video.summary: Robert sues property manager Jorge for $10,000, claiming harassment, unlawful entry, and invasion of privacy. Jorge denies the accusations, says he's just doing his job, and countersues for $10,000, alleging he's the one being harassed.
Video.title: Nosey Landlord

Video.summary: Heather is suing her mother. After she bred her dog, her mother gave two of the puppies to her sister to sell.
Video.title: Dog Tired

Video.summary: A man asked his roommate to watch his puppy when he was out of town, but the puppy died in her care, so he is suing; she says she had nothing to do with the puppy's death and denies owing anything.
Video.title: Paw Prints of Deceit

Video.summary: Andrea wants $3000 from her ex-boyfriend after stealing from her during her active addiction.
Video.title: Taking Advantage

Video.summary: Kaitlynn claims her ex abused her while pregnant with his child and is here to sue him for over $4,000.
Video.title: Playing House Gone Wrong

Video.summary: Liatwanne petitions the court for rehab for her son, saying he's an addict who started using drugs as a teen.
Video.title: Running with the Wrong Crowd

Video.summary: A woman claims she promoted the defendant's cosmetic line on social media but never got paid; the defendant says the plaintiff dragged his name and his products through the mud.
Video.title: Likes for Lipstick

Video.summary: Mikaela is suing her hair dresser after she left mid-service for a DUI class, and now her hair is falling out.
Video.title: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Image.alt: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property damage and theft of a cell phone, and he says she stole his assistance check; a car accident reportedly caused by the defendant has left the plaintiff with damage to her car and lost wages.
Video.title: Checked Out

Video.summary: First, a woman sues her brother for failure to repay a loan! Then, the plaintiff sues for rental repayment.
Video.title: Pay Up or Get Out

Video.summary: Ex-roommates call each other a deadbeat and a con artist; a former tenant wants to be compensated for repairs he made to a flooded, moldy basement, and his security deposit.
Video.title: Con-venient Deadbeat
